title: Senior Software Engineer - Tech Mahindra Holdings Services - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Tech Mahindra Holdings Services - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
We at Tech Mahindra Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tech Mahindra Holdings Services:
Tech Mahindra Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tech Mahindra Holdings Services!
